speaker: MATT
raw_text: Algar shouts it off to Zsundie down below. Let's roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What is the distance from where we are to the terrace balcony space that they're on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say roughly 80 or so feet. At this point, Zsundie comes to a stop and looks over his shoulder in your direction and goes, "Oh. Intruders." Algar shouts off, "What? How?" and holds up his lantern and focuses the beam over across the way there. You guys, even though you're up against the wall, there's nothing to hide behind. The light pushes past a few of you and then stops. He shouts off, "Dispatch them quickly!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who says that? Zsundie?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt's gone, I guess. Oh, he's back!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me for a moment of preparation here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's real water. And colored lights!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is the difficulty of doing this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Melora.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: This is dope, man! Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you think we were going to get to this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I didn't know if you were. This is the difficulty of doing this in here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Dungeons & Dragons just broke!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know, that's all right. We will fix this, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You sounded like Bob Ross as he was saying that. It's all happening nicely.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's so worth it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And with that, guys--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Give it to me now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd like you guys to place yourselves, if you can, where you would be on this side of the chamber as you enter. There is Zsundie.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, what? He's awesome-looking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And there is the large elemental where you had seen him. The worker has run past and vanished into the chamber before, and there on the top, looking over the terrace, the dwarven bodyguards right there. And that's Algar right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's the tall one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he's the tall one right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt, I'm putting Frumpkin in this corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're not in the room, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we haven't come in yet. We were all hiding in this little thing. I'm putting you in the back, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure. I mean, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that was our lineup.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So you can hop up. Oh, that's true. That was our lineup.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was stealthing so hard, I'm playing with the McElroys right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So how far is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For that right there? To Algar, from you? Somewhere in the neighborhood of 60 to 70 feet. You're not entirely sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You said roll for initiative?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, got to roll for initiative.
